purpose: Keep-a-Changelog formatted record of all notable changes to ai-dev-envbuild, organized by semver version with Added/Changed sections; current stable is 1.2.0.
invariants: Each released version has a GitHub compare link at the bottom of the file
gotchas: The [Unreleased] section must be kept even when empty — it is the staging area for the next release
Version 1.2.0 introduced source_repo field in manifest, --dry-run flag, git hooks wiring, hooks/pre-commit, mcp-server/denylist.json, and .github/workflows/ci.yml
